creator: ivan@drm.su
text:
Hi,

The UMFPACK option brings gcc dependency.

Can we turn it off by default to achieve the pkg without gcc deps?

Example:
I run pkg install gimp and it requires gcc13.

After a long digging into the issue I found out that graphics/gegl brings the dependency. Building it from ports without UMFPACK fixes the issue.


Or may be add a separate package with UMFPACK flavor? Like we have with git and git-lite or git-tiny.

The goal is to run pkg install gimp without gcc13.
